The '''North Apartments''' was a residential complex located in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. It consisted of five rooms arranged in a circle.<ref name="KotOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> Among its inhabitants in [[3956 BBY]]<ref name="CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> was [[Largo]], who used the apartments as a hideout after [[Zax]], a local criminal, placed a bounty on his head.<ref name="KotOR" />

===Residents===
*Largo
*Zax
*[[Sarna (Sith military)|Sarna]]
*[[Yun Genda]]
*[[Unidentified Aqualish (North Apartments)|An Aqualish]]

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
